'''shasadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearnought|fearnought]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearnought|fearnought]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shasadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæsædhæth|shæsædhæth]] || [[word:shæsædhæj|shæsædhæj]] || [[word:shæsædhæsh|shæsædhæsh]] || [[word:shæsædhæ|shæsædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shasasadhath|shasasadhath]] || [[word:shasasadhaj|shasasadhaj]] || [[word:shasasadhash|shasasadhash]] || [[word:shasasadha|shasasadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shasadhath|shasadhath]] || [[word:shasadhaj|shasadhaj]] || [[word:shasadhash|shasadhash]] || [[word:shasadha|shasadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shasafdhath|shasafdhath]] || [[word:shasafdhaj|shasafdhaj]] || [[word:shasafdhash|shasafdhash]] || [[word:shasafdhaf|shasafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shasadhatha|shasadhatha]] || [[word:shasadhaja|shasadhaja]] || [[word:shasadhasha|shasadhasha]] || [[word:shasadhaka|shasadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shasadhath|shasadhath]] || [[word:shasadhaj|shasadhaj]] || [[word:shasadhash|shasadhash]] || [[word:shasadha|shasadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shasadhathal|shasadhathal]] || [[word:shasadhajal|shasadhajal]] || [[word:shasadhashal|shasadhashal]] || [[word:shasadhakal|shasadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shasadhathatha|shasadhathatha]] || [[word:shasadhajaja|shasadhajaja]] || [[word:shasadhashasha|shasadhashasha]] || [[word:shasadhaka|shasadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shasadhathan|shasadhathan]] || [[word:shasadhajan|shasadhajan]] || [[word:shasadhashan|shasadhashan]] || [[word:shasadhakan|shasadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shasadhathaoro|shasadhathaoro]] || [[word:shasadhajaoro|shasadhajaoro]] || [[word:shasadhashaoro|shasadhashaoro]] || [[word:shasadhakaoro|shasadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
